description_long: This vending machine is a rectangular, upright unit with a predominantly white exterior and a lower section featuring a blue and green geometric design. The front face displays a large blue display panel at the top, with branding and instructions, followed by a row of product images and prices, suggesting a variety of snacks and drinks available for purchase. Below the product selection area, there is a product retrieval slot with a dark interior and a metallic or plastic trim. To the right of the product images, a vertical payment interface is visible, likely accommodating coins, bills, and possibly cards. The sides and back of the machine are plain, with the colored design continuing along the lower portion. The overall appearance is modern and clean, suitable for placement in public urban environments.
description: A modern, rectangular vending machine with a white body, blue and green lower accent, and a detailed front panel featuring product images, branding, and a payment interface.
description_view_0: The back of the vending machine, plain and white with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: A side view showing the white surface and the lower blue-green geometric accent, with no interactive features visible.
description_view_2: The front view, displaying the main interactive panel with branding, product images, payment interface, and product retrieval slot.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the white surface and blue-green accent at the bottom.
attribute_display_panel: A large rectangular blue display panel is located at the top front of the machine, featuring branding, instructions, and product images. It occupies about one-third of the front face and includes both digital and printed elements.
attribute_payment_interface: A vertical payment interface is present on the right side of the front panel, featuring a coin slot, bill acceptor, and possibly a card reader, all arranged in a column.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A row of individual product selection buttons is located below the display panel, each corresponding to a product image and price, arranged horizontally.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, rectangular product retrieval slot is located at the lower center of the front face, with a dark interior and metallic or plastic trim.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Branding is prominently displayed on the upper front panel, with a blue background, white logo, and additional signage in white and green, including the text 'smart en' and product information.
